item.title: Cambridge Audio Topaz SR20 Stereo Receiver - $199 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Cambridge Audio Topaz SR20 stereo receiver in excellent condition with remote control and power cord. 100 watts per channel of crisp clear sound. Awesome and powerful receiver for $199 firm.

item.description: fully functional and powerful.

item.description: fully functional and sounds great.

item.description: Pioneer Stereo Receiver #SX-201. Serial MK3964138C. Estimate mid 1990's. No Damage to Case. Pick Up.

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Korg DW-8000/EX-8000 Preload Programs Cassette - $20 (N. RI)
item.description: This tape sold for $49/95 from Rondo Music & shipping & tax. Buy mine for $20.

item.title: Stereo Microphone And Wind Muff for Apple iOS Devices iM2 I-pad/I-Pod - $20 (Chepachet)
item.description: I have two of these, each with the TEAC wind muff/

item.title: JSE Infinite Slope Model 1 Audiophile Stereo Speakers - $199 (Cranston)
item.description: Awesome sounding JSE Infinite Slope Model 1 audiophile stereo speakers. Very good cosmetic condition. One woofer had dust cap replaced and one midrange had dust cap pushed in but I got it to pop back out leaving it wrinkled. Tweeters have been replaced with recommended Morel MDT32-S tweeters. These slight imperfections do not affect the sound. These are unique speakers that sound fantastic at all volume levels and can play very loud. They are on casters so easy to move around. Sharp looking with glossy black finish and cool cabinet shape. You can hear them prior to purchase. Amazing speakers for $199 firm.

item.title: Adcom GFA-5400 Stereo Power Amplifier - $249 (Cranston)
item.description: Fantastic Adcom GFA-5400 stereo power amplifier in excellent condition. Works great and sounds amazing. 125 watts per channel. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. I also have a nice Adcom preamp for sale. Beautiful amp for $249 firm.

item.title: VPI Scout Audiophile Turntable - $1,099 (Cranston)
item.description: Highly regarded VPI Scout turntable from the giant of turntable companies. JMW Memorial tonearm. No cartridge included. Excellent, like new condition. Table, arm, motor, record clamp, cork mat and power cord included. This was reviewed to be the best turntable in it's price range and is likely the best one you will find for $1099 firm.

item.title: Plinius M16 Audiophile Stereo Preamplifier - $999 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice high end Plinius M16 preamp in excellent condition and sounds amazing. Revision 1A. 6 RCA inputs, 1 balanced input and 3 outputs, 2 RCA and one balanced. Heavy duty remote control and owners manual included. Although this says phono on one of the inputs, it does not have the optional phono stage built in so you need to use an external phono preamplifier. The phono input is a normal line level input and can take componenets like CD players, tuners, etc... Plinius is known for a warm tube-like sound. This is dead quiet and sounds fantastic. I will demonstrate it's functionality for you. Great preamp for $999 firm.

item.title: Amazing Audio Research LS2 Hybrid Tube/SS Stereo Preamplifier - $899 (Cranston)
item.description: This Audio Research LS2 preamp uses one 6DJ8 tube. It is a hybrid tube/solid state design. It sounds super transparent and really lets an amplifier sound it's best. There are very positive reviews online. 5 sets of RCA inputs and one set balanced. 2 RCA outputs and 2 balanced. This model has no remote control. Clean condition, works great and sounds amazing. I will demonstrate it for you. Nice high end preamp from one of the best audio companies out there for $899 firm.

item.title: Adcom GFA-545 Stereo Amplifier 100 Watts Per Channel - $199 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice Adcom GFA-545 stereo power amplifier. Super clean cosmetic condition and sounds amazing, especially for the money. It is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great amp for $199 firm.

item.title: Onkyo Stereo Audio Amplifier - $50 (Warwick)
item.description: Up for sale is an Onkyo Stereo Amplifier. Works as it should, in good condition. You can see from photo that the plastic power button is missing, but this does not affect ability to turn on or off, as switch works as it should.

item.title: Vintage Sansui stereo tuner amplifier 210 - $100
item.description: Very clean vintage Sansui 210 stereo tuner amplifier. I cleaned the switches. My daughter upgraded to a new receiver with Bluetooth, so I am selling this Sansui.

item.title: Big Denon 4802 Receiver and speakers on stands - $300 (Warwick)
item.description: I have a DENON AVR 4802 Receiver that is an absolute beast of a receiver.

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.description: Home Stereo / Audio System

item.title: Long range FM antenna for stereo - $15 (Coventry)
item.description: If you ask ·" is it available " you will be blocked, reported and cursed..be warned! This is a folding FM roof or attic mount antenna. It is folded in the picture and is about 4 feet long and 4 feet wide when opened. Has never been outdoors, always was mounted in my attic. Picked up station approximately 75 miles away (Boston) areas.

item.title: Polk Audio 6 speaker set with Tuner, cd burner, cassette deck - $300 (Contoocook, NH)
item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. One owner only, me. Please no chats.

item.title: Galaxy Audio Any Spot Stero wireless In Ear Monitors - $199 (providence)
item.description: Used only 2 times like new priced to sell.Retail new for $329.99 plus Tax . The Galaxy Audio AS-1200 is a durable, reliable, high-fidelity monitoring system that will have your band playing their best! This system includes an AS-1200T transmitter with 210 selectable UHF frequencies, stereo or mono transmission, and a backlit LCD display. The AS-1200R receiver comes equipped with a built-in limiter and a backlit LCD display. If you're looking to expand your set in the future, the AS-1200 system is designed to work with ensembles of any size, pairing with an unlimited number of additional receivers.

item.title: Bose Wave radio music system - $249 (Lincoln Rhode Island)

item.title: Whole house Estate Sale Mid Century, Lincoln, Rhode Island (Lincoln RI)
item.description: This is such a nostalgic Sale! This house is a Mid Century time capsule. We have some really fun mid century furniture, including a rattan, saucer, chair, lots of small side tables, seagull art, Rhode Island collectibles, Brown University memorabilia 1960s era Including a letterman`s jacket, vintage clothing, jewelry, vanity and linens, children's book collection 1940s and 50s, including first editions, lamps, kitchen wear, holiday, radios, vintage televisions, old cabinet with radio turntable, talking machine table top Victrola with a matching oak cabinet. It is in excellent condition and still plays. We have some old camping equipment, including a 1950s Indian motif Camp blanket! We have records, books, decor, and more everything must Go! Host Elegant Elephant Antiques and Estates not I can't promise to get to every question about prices, condition etc... happy to price by the lot on Saturday! ... 16 Vista Dr Lincoln RI
